title: Wemmbu playlist music disc pack
description: This resource pack changes the minecraft music discs to songs that wemmbu has used in his unstable smp videos.
body:
The music disc are changed like this
13-PLAYFULL MASACRE
blocks-PLAYING WITH FIRE
far-ALTERED OBSIDIAN
mall-tiny sand rat(battle)
chirp-ABOVE THE LAW
cat-ABIVE THE LAW(srry I was rushing)
Mellohi-BATTLE UNDER A BROKEN SKY
Strad-RIVAL
Stal-RIVAL(vs jadenman)
Wait-RIVAL(sounds like ice kind of)
Otherside-preparation for war
5-CHAOS CINSTRUCT
11-EVE'S ALTER EGO
Ward-PLAYFULL MASACRE(2v1000 version)
Pigstep-DIVINITY DISSONANT
Creator-MECHANICAL GOD
Creator(music box)-Absolute Tension
Precipice-Sorcery Ring
lava chicken-rematch
Relic-PLAYING WITH FIRE(love violon ver)
Tears-BATTLE AGAINST A TRUE SAMURAI
